ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clergy_members" (
  "clergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clergy member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the clergy member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the clergy member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the clergy member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the clergy member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the clergy member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the clergy member */,
  "ordination_date" TEXT /* Date of ordination of the clergy member */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date of retirement of the clergy member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the clergy member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clergy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employement_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits associated with the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_statuses" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment status */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churches" (
  "church_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each church */,
  "church_name" TEXT /* Name of the church */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the church */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the church */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the church */,
  "denomination" TEXT /* Denomination of the church */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the church */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("church_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "clergy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clergy member being assigned */,
  "church_id" INTEGER /* ID of the church where the clergy member is being assigned */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position being assigned */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment status of the assignment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES employement_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_church_id FOREIGN KEY ("church_id") REFERENCES churches ("church_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_clergy_id FOREIGN KEY ("clergy_id") REFERENCES clergy_members ("clergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "church_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "church_id" INTEGER /* ID of the church the statistics belong to */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the church on the given date */,
  "membership" INTEGER /* Membership of the church on the given date */,
  "giving" REAL /* Giving of the church on the given date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the statistics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_church_stats_church_id FOREIGN KEY ("church_id") REFERENCES churches ("church_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "edu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational entry */,
  "clergy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clergy member the education belongs to */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned by the clergy member */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the degree was earned */,
  "grad_date" TEXT /* Date the degree was earned */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_clergy_id FOREIGN KEY ("clergy_id") REFERENCES clergy_members ("clergy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training entry */,
  "clergy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clergy member the training belongs to */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_clergy_id FOREIGN KEY ("clergy_id") REFERENCES clergy_members ("clergy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "cert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification entry */,
  "clergy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clergy member the certification belongs to */,
  "cert_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "cert_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was earned */,
  "certifying_body" TEXT /* Body that certified the clergy member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_clergy_id FOREIGN KEY ("clergy_id") REFERENCES clergy_members ("clergy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, clergy, church admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "church_denominations" (
  "denom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each denomination */,
  "denomination_name" TEXT /* Name of the denomination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the denomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("denom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "church_denomination_bridge" (
  "church_id" INTEGER /* ID of the church */,
  "denom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the denomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("church_id", "denom_id")
)
